title: rubus variegatus
intro: Rubus variegatus, also known as the Variegated Raspberry or Indian Raspberry, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family and is native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus variegatus include reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, as well as providing relief from fever and skin conditions. Rubus variegatus can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also used as a raw material in the production of traditional medicine products.
